name: Umber
description:
Umber is an adult male MudWing from Wings of Fire books. He is the student at Jade Mountain Academy as a member of the Jade Winglet. Umber is very kind-hearted dragon and smallest of his siblings, but brave, loyal and fiercely protective towards the loved ones. He has a crush on Qibli, but still open for relationship.


✦✦Personality✦✦

Umber is a caring, observant, and loyal dragon, and is very kind towards his loved ones. He experiences a warm, constant sense of relief related to the end of the war. He is incredibly loyal to and fond of his siblings, and thinks very highly of them; he wants to protect them and keep them safe, regardless of the cost.

In Moon Rising, Umber is revealed to be gay, making him the first character in the series to have a confirmed sexuality.


Credits: art by the Frosted Monster and official art by Brianna C. Walsh (edited by WillowCharlotte1234)
